name: python3-zope.interface
title: python3-zope.interface
description:
Interfaces for Python3
This package provides an implementation of object interfaces for Python.
Interfaces are a mechanism for labeling objects as conforming to a given API
or contract. So, this package can be considered as implementation of the
Design By Contract methodology support in Python.
.
This is the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zope.interface because Interfaces for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zope.interface as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zope.interface with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zope.interface --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
